# Hello, Playdate {#sec-hello}

*(Pipeline proof stub — full chapter to come.)*

The state our first program needs:

{{< snip 01-hello/source/main.lua setup >}}

And its update loop:

{{< snip 01-hello/source/main.lua update >}}

![The greeting, twenty frames in.](../figures/01-hello/hello-early.png){#fig-hello-early}

![Two hundred frames later the bot has pressed A seven times.](../figures/01-hello/hello-later.png){#fig-hello-later}
